case_title: DESSMAN, REVIUS VS CENTRAL TOWERS APARTMENTS et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. SUSPENCE DATE 1/23/98, FOR COMM. RULING.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DESSMAN, REVIUS AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL TOWERS APARTMENTS HARRIS, REBECCA AKA RODRIGUEZ, REBECCA: MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ROBERT EARL AULT.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT REVIUS DESSMAN: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER KAPLAN. COPY OF DENIAL SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO ROBERT EARL AULT POS FIL ED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESSMAN, REVIUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL TOWERS APARTMENTS HARRIS, REBECCA AKA RODRIGUEZ, REBECCA: MANAGER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, REBECCA AKA RODRIGUEZ, REBECCA: MANAGER
COPY OF MOREC TO REBECCA HARRIS RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN;
REQUEST TO CORRECT OT VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT REVIUS DESSMAN: DENIED BY COMM. KAPLAN.
REQUEST TO CORRRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT REVIUS M. DESSMAN: DENIED. COPIES SENT TO BOTH PLFT AND DEFT.
